author: DominicVainMod
content:
@here

 SA Team Holiday Break  

Hey, everyone!

We wanted to let you know that the team will be on break from now until January 3rd. During this time, we will have very limited availability and do our best to get back to any questions when we can.

It's been an incredible year and we are grateful for the community that makes this dream possible.

2023 is going to be even better and we can't wait to share this journey with you all. We hope you and your loved ones have a safe and happy holiday season!
